reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by to buy something, the milanesa was incredible, complete with toasted bread. The girls were super friendly and the place was cool and clean.

reviews.comment:
Paramos a cargar nafta y aprovechamos para medir la presión de los neumáticos porque veníamos viajando desde la costa. Noté algo raro en la válvula de la manguera y decidí no continuar con el resto de las ruedas. Al kilómetro se desinfló esa cubierta y me di cuenta de que me había roto mi válvula. Pésimo. No pueden ofrecer un servicio que no solo no funciona sino que rompe !!!!!!!!!!!!! De terror!!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to get gas and took the opportunity to check the tire pressure since we'd been traveling from the coast. I noticed something strange about the valve on the hose and decided not to continue checking the rest of the tires. After about a kilometer, that tire went flat, and I realized my valve had broken. Terrible. They can't offer a service that not only doesn't work but breaks things! Absolutely awful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwdWNDUmlnRRAB
